title: New Faithful Overlays
description: New version of the previous Faithful Overlays! Adds seamless block transitions and overlays for certain blocks.
body:
**Disclaimer: This version is based on the new Faithful Texture pack created by previous members of MrVizzy/Kraineff's Faithful Texture pack. Watch [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kgZYBTlwaVs) for more info.**

## **About**
Transform your builds with **New Faithful Overlays**, an addon/resource pack designed to enhance your Faithful texture pack experience. Using connected textures, this pack introduces stunning transitions and overlays that seamlessly blend blocks together.

Imagine grass spreading onto adjacent stone blocks, or pathways that naturally merge with their surroundings—these small details bring a new level of immersion to your creations. Perfect for builders looking to spice up their environments, whether it’s roads, pathways, or entirely custom landscapes. It gives your builds a polished, natural look — a must-have for every builder who is also a Faithful enthusiast!

## **Compatibility**
This pack is compatible only with the official Faithful texture pack. Install this on TOP of the Faithful texture pack or it will not work. Make sure you are using either Optifine or you have Indium and Continuity on the mods folder if you are using Sodium.

## **Credits**
- Faithful Team (I am one of the contributors and addon makers)
- [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)

### **If you are going to share this addon/texture pack to others through YouTube and other websites, please remember to properly credit me. I am seeing other websites stealing my work without my permission.**

## **Other Projects**
- [Faithful Serif](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-serif)
